programme.title: Building Off the Grid
programme.desc: A young family in Alabama breaks ground on its forever home during peak hurricane season; between the delays from flooding, waiting for their building kit to arrive and falling glass, it will take everything they have to make this dream a reality.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Building Off the Grid
programme.desc: A Georgia couple is ready to tackle their next off-grid build: the ultimate watchtower guest house in the Blue Ridge Mountains; building 30 feet off the ground presents its challenges.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Building Off the Grid
programme.desc: Two renovators purchase land in Colorado to build a new home away from home; they decide to use a rammed-earth process to construct all-natural walls; when winter comes early, they realize this process is more laborious than anticipated.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.sub-title: Getting Down in Deep Creek, Maryland
programme.desc: A family of six looks for a vacation home on Deep Creek Lake, Md., but the lakefront property of their dreams needs some major renovations.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.desc: A Minnesota couple searches for a vacation home in Texas that reminds them of their home state, and their agent finds a lakefront property that needs quite a few repairs.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.sub-title: A Renovation Thats Off the Chain
programme.desc: A family who loves the outdoors hopes to find a house along the Chain of Lakes; this former orange grove has become a vacation hot spot, so it might be tough to find a place with a price tag that leaves enough leftover to make it their own.

programme.desc: Empty nesters find a home on Lake of the Ozarks, Missouri, and leave snowy Indiana behind. He's a contractor and offers hands-on help during the renovation, but a major discovery during demolition disrupts the couple's plans.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders
programme.desc: The Barnwood Builders travel to Ripley, W. Va. to take down a quintessential log cabin; Mark inspects cabins in need of repair for the nearby farm museum; the guys visit Ryan's old high school.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders
programme.desc: The builders travel to Flintstone, Md. to save a unique double pen bank barn dating back to the 1800s; the clients are young homesteaders on a mission to restore the land back to its original glory.

programme.title: Home Reimagined
programme.desc: Designer Vern Yip mentors furniture makers as they renovate a historic garment factory in Salem, NY.; the couple preserves the most unique parts of the building while adding modern day conveniences and their own design style.

programme.title: Home Reimagined
programme.desc: Host and designer Vern Yip travels across the country to mentor brave renovators who have taken on the task of converting unusual commercial and industrial spaces into one-of-a-kind family homes.

programme.title: Home Reimagined
programme.desc: A couple wants to update an old brick brewery into a forever home for their family; with Vern's help, they take a local landmark from cold and industrial to warm and stylish with an eclectic design.

programme.title: Home Reimagined
programme.desc: Host and designer Vern Yip travels across the country to mentor brave renovators who have taken on the task of converting unusual commercial and industrial spaces into one-of-a-kind family homes.

programme.desc: Host and designer Vern Yip travels across the country to mentor brave renovators who have taken.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid
programme.desc: An overworked gymnastics coach begins working on his dream cabin in Utah's Wasatch Mountain Range; malfunctioning equipment, being far from town, extreme weather, and unpredictable wildlife threaten to turn his dream into a nightmare.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Building Off the Grid
programme.desc: A couple looks to build an eco-friendly, off-the-grid geodesic dome, cooled using geothermal caves, with a view of Tennessee's South Cumberland Mountain Range; uncertain weather; an intricate design; treacherous mountain paths.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Treehouse Masters
programme.desc: Two retirees get a retreat on their 100-acre Wisconsin farm; Pete builds a barnlike birdhouse with three separate pods -- an art studio, an office and a lounge -- complete with a screened-in porch and a deck overlooking their stable of alpacas.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters
programme.desc: Pete builds an outside-in tree house and installs a sauna in the trees.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters
programme.desc: When asked in 2016 what she would do with her winnings, "America's Got Talent" Season 11 winner Grace Vanderwaal said she wanted a tree house built by Pete Nelson; the 13-year-old singer-songwriter's wish comes true.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Treehouse Masters
programme.desc: Pete and the team travel to Trempealeau, Wis., to build a rustic river shack-themed tree house for two parents who yearn for an easy escape after a long day.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.desc: Frequent visitors to the popular beach town of Ocean City, Md., decide to take a big chance and invest in property for their family.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.desc: Vicky and Rome are looking to trade in the hustle and bustle of life in New York for the sun and surf of Flagler Beach, Fla.; they find an oceanfront property perfect for their new lifestyle, but it's in need of a major overhaul.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.sub-title: Young Vacationers Buy and Renovate a Beach Home on Oak Island
programme.desc: A Utah couple visited Oak Island and loved it so much they moved to North Carolina. After years of outings to the island, they're ready to buy and renovate their own beach home where their two young kids can grow up experiencing beach life.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.desc: A family of four renovates a waterfront home on the canal in Galveston, Texas.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.desc: A couple wants to find a property on Fripp Island, N.C., and after finding a place, demolition leads to discoveries.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.sub-title: A Couple Fulfills Their Dream of Moving to Cape Cod, MA Full-Time
programme.desc: A Massachusetts couple buys an outdated beach house and lives there while completely gutting and renovating it into a dream home; they aim to fulfill their dream of having a waterfront property and living year-round on Cape Cod.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.sub-title: Full-On Fixer-Upper in St.Pete Beach, Florida
programme.desc: A couple realizes their budget balloons in relation to their plans for renovation.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.desc: A couple wants to find a property on Fripp Island, N.C., and after finding a place, demolition leads to discoveries.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.sub-title: A Couple Fulfills Their Dream of Moving to Cape Cod, MA Full-Time
programme.desc: A Massachusetts couple buys an outdated beach house and lives there while completely gutting and renovating it into a dream home; they aim to fulfill their dream of having a waterfront property and living year-round on Cape Cod.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.sub-title: Full-On Fixer-Upper in St.Pete Beach, Florida
programme.desc: A couple realizes their budget balloons in relation to their plans for renovation.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.desc: A family of four renovates a waterfront home on the canal in Galveston, Texas.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders
programme.desc: Building a custom log guest home in Dandridge, Tenn.; as the cabin takes shape high in the hills of the Great Smoky Mountains, Mark visits one of the most famous log homes in the country; Johnny visits a candy store in Gatlinburg, Tenn.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders
programme.desc: The Barnwood Builders build a timber-frame pavilion behind their showroom; Mark wants to build these outdoor living structures as kits using a notching system; while Ryan cooks, Mark visits the Sheriff's cabin in the Great Smoky Mountains.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders
programme.desc: The Barnwood Builders head to the hills of Pocahontas County, W.V., to try something new; working with repurposed factory beams and hand hewn timbers, they create a hybrid timber frame structure with a shed roof.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders
programme.desc: The Barnwood Builders travel to New Salem, Tennessee to save a rare 19th century saddlebag style cabin before it's too late, battling the elements to preserve every last timber; Mark tours a home built from container cabins.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders
programme.desc: The Barnwood Builders are on the hunt for spare parts as they travel deep into one holler and high atop another to two different towns to save two different barns; along the way they find rare artifacts and visit a historic pioneer village.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders
programme.desc: The Barnwood Builders travel to save a fine example of a Pennsylvania bank barn; crafted from white oak, the timberframe features a style of diagonal bracing they've never encountered before.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: Chase Morrill and his team attempt to save a historic cabin which was owned by a famous Maine politician, but they unearth a surprise that may derail the whole project.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: Chase and his team must renovate two A-frames in Maine's Sugarloaf Valley; with only six weeks to accomplish both renovations, Chase splits the team down the middle.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: Chase and his team renovate an off-the-grid camp for a family of city slickers; with limited resources, the team members work to incorporate the comforts of city living, then they discover a moldering water tank that may shut down the renovation.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: In New Sharon, Maine, Chase and his team help Rod save his rundown camp from falling into the pristine Kimball Pond; he'd like to patch up the holes and get his wife to come back to the camp, which means it's going to need a lot of work.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: Chase and his team are called in to renovate a neglected camp for a growing family; the unusual footprint proves troublesome when trying to create a second bedroom; outside, the steep slope becomes a challenge just hours before the reveal.
